Trier · District

Olewig

Olewig sits in the southeast of Trier. Officially a city district, it has always been a wine village at heart. Family-run wineries cluster around the old village core, the Weinkulturpfad (wine culture trail) winds through the surrounding hillside vineyards, and in early August the Olewiger Weinfest celebrates the Riesling and Elbling harvest.

WeinWeingueterRiesling

Sights in Olewig

Park

Olewig

Olewig Wine Culture Trail

An educational trail through the vineyards of Olewig (a wine village within Trier). 5 km, 14 stations, with rest stops overlooking the Moselle.

Free admission

Hotels in Olewig

★★★★
Guest favourite

Olewig

Weinhaus Becker

Boutique wine house with the Michelin-starred Becker's restaurant in Olewig (a wine village within Trier). Cuisine and wine at the highest level.

⭐ 9.2/10 · 480 reviews From 145 €
★★★

Olewig

Hotel-Weinhaus Haag

Family-run wine house in the heart of Olewig. House wines, a traditional tavern room, and short walks home.

⭐ 8.8/10 · 540 reviews From 89 €

Experiences by GetYourGuide

Wine tastings around Olewig

Olewig is the wine village of Trier, so it's the place for guided wine tastings and winery tours on the Mosel.

* Affiliate link. Booking via GetYourGuide at no extra cost to you; we earn a commission.

Restaurants in Olewig

Michelin-starred
Upscale

Olewig

Becker's Restaurant

Michelin-starred restaurant run by the Becker family in Olewig (a wine village within Trier). Modern cuisine, estate wines, wine-led pairings.

Winery / Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weingut Reverchon

Winery with a courtyard wine tavern. Estate wines plus Moselle platters, tarte flambée, and winemaker's bread.

Winery / Straußwirtschaft
Budget

Olewig

Weingut Rummel

A classic Olewig Straußwirtschaft (seasonal tavern run by a winery). Estate wine, a simple menu, and a local atmosphere.

Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weinstube Palais Kesselstatt (Olewig)

The wine tavern of Weingut Kesselstatt, with tastings and a small menu.

Wine House
Mid-range

Olewig

Trierer Weinhaus

A local classic in Olewig. Well-curated Mosel wine list and simple regional dishes.

Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weinstube Friedrich-Wilhelm-Gymnasium

The foundation-run wine tavern of the FWG school. Wines from estate vineyards in a classic Trier setting.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
